titleStmt.title: SII 38.387: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 387. (A.R. No. 387 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmbā temple.

p.hi: King: Sadāśivadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1470 A.D. Saumya (wrong); Rishabha śu. full moon, Monday, Tiruvōṇam = irregular.

summary.p: Damaged. Seems to record a gift of land, owned by the temple (tirunāmakkāṇi) of Nayinār Tirumalar uḍaiya Nayinār in Murugamaṅgalapaṟṟu in Palkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, to a certain ••••• vāruṇa [Siva] Nāyakkar, as kāṇiyāṭchi.
Vīrappaṉ, the temple accountant, figures as signatory of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuvastiśrī śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ catācivateva makārāyar piṟutivi yirācciyam paṇṇi
Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 7 10 mel cellā niṉṟa cavumiyavaruṣattu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu
pavurṇamiyum comavāramum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattunāḷ ceyamkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu
murutaRead murukamaṅkalappaṟṟumaṅkalappaṟṟu nayiṉār tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār tirunāmakāṇiyāṉa pariyantāṅkal taṟmaracaṉ
Ūṟṟukkuṭaiyān tāṅkal Akaram palar cūrāla p pākṣaparattu pākkavāc cokka ce kkar cevai
vāruṇacivanāyakkarukku caṉtirātittavaraikku
kāṇi Āṭci tāṉam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi Iṉta kirāmattil Uṇṭāṉa ṉañcai puñcai pātapa
ṇṭāna ṉiti ṉikṣepa calapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Ākāmi citti cāttiya
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakala kaṉtāyamum Uḷpaṭa veṇṭu payiṟcey caṉtirātittava
lāpam tārai
Iṉta kāṇikku Akitam paṇṇa
varkaḷRead paṇṇiṉavarkaḷtaṅkaḷ mātāpitākkaḷaiyum pirāmaṇaraiyum kāraām pacuvaiyum keṅkaikaraiyile koṉṟa to[ṣa]ttile pokakaṭavarākavum
k kalveṭṭukku kurukkaḷ tāṉattār māyecura mutaliyaḷ Ippaṭikku koyilkaṇakku virappaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
